{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Grace
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Underlord candidate, Akura Underlord, leader of the Akura backup team, warrior, Underlady
| abilities = sword Path, shadow Path
| affiliations = Akura team, Akura clan, Akura backup team
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Akura Grace Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura]] [[Grace]] is a skilled [[Underlord]] and a member of the [[Akura clan]]. A descendant of the clan, she possesses physical traits reminiscent of the [[Monarch Malice]], including long dark hair and a full figure. Although she did not successfully bond with any of the [[Books of Seven Pages]], she is a proficient combatant who has mastered both her shadow Path and the use of a long, curved, single-edged saber. [[Grace]] served as the leader of the [[Akura backup team]] during a tournament, a group assembled to replace the destroyed [[Rising Earth team]]. Under her leadership, the team performed reasonably well, with [[Grace]] personally maintaining thirty-second place before being eliminated after an encounter with a team of [[dragons]]. Within her family, she is the daughter of [[Akura Earnest]] and Kiya and was considered a highly talented individual expected to bring significant prestige to her lineage. She is also a [[Truegold]].}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|As a young [[Underlord]] within the [[Akura clan]], [[Akura]] [[Grace]] serves as an [[Underlord]] candidate for her team. She has mastered both the shadow and [[sword]] [[Paths]], utilizing a lightly curved saber as her primary weapon and remaking her bodies in [[soulfire]]. During the competition, she took charge by leading the [[Akura backup team]]. However, her journey ended when she was eliminated during the second round.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] is an [[Underlord]] candidate for the [[Akura]] team.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] has mastered her [[sword]] and shadow Path.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] is a young [[Akura]] [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] uses a lightly curved saber as her weapon.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]]'s bodies are remade in [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] is an [[Underlord]] in the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] leads the [[Akura backup team]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] was eliminated during the second round.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Grace]] carries a curving single-edged [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] exchanged nods with [[Akura Grace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Grace]] was found dead, pinned to a wall by a [[Forged spear]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Grace]] was a warrior and an [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Akura clan]]
[[Category:Akura backup team]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
